assumptions: The question is assessed at the consolidated financial statements level.
The intragroup dividend has resulted in a recognised intragroup monetary receivable/payable.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognised foreign-currency monetary receivable is a recognised item that can fall within the fair value hedge model, subject to the intragroup foreign-currency exception in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS treats foreign-currency risk on transactions, including eligible intragroup forecast transactions in consolidated financial statements, under the cash flow hedge model as a distinct top-level hedge accounting approach.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS identifies hedges of foreign-currency risk arising from a net investment in a foreign operation as a separate hedge accounting model relevant to intragroup foreign-currency exposures.
